content.json:
# Copilot Studio Agent Monitoring

Local draft workbook for review.
Data source: your Application Insights component (update the resource IDs in this workbook before importing).
Focus: latency, errors, topic quality, and near-real-time traffic.

content.query: customEvents | where timestamp > ago(24h) | extend channelId=tostring(customDimensions['channelId']) | where channelId in ('m365copilot','msteams','teams') | where name in ('BotMessageReceived','BotMessageSend') | summarize userTs=minif(timestamp, name=='BotMessageReceived'), botTs=minif(timestamp, name=='BotMessageSend') by operation_Id, session_Id | where isnotempty(userTs) and isnotempty(botTs) | extend latencyMs = datetime_diff('millisecond', botTs, userTs) | summarize conversations=count(), p50=percentile(latencyMs, 50), p95=percentile(latencyMs, 95), avg=avg(latencyMs), max=max(latencyMs)
content.title: Latency Summary (24h)

content.query: customEvents | where timestamp > ago(24h) | extend channelId=tostring(customDimensions['channelId']) | where channelId in ('m365copilot','msteams','teams') | where name in ('BotMessageReceived','BotMessageSend') | summarize userTs=minif(timestamp, name=='BotMessageReceived'), botTs=minif(timestamp, name=='BotMessageSend') by operation_Id, session_Id | where isnotempty(userTs) and isnotempty(botTs) | extend latencyMs = datetime_diff('millisecond', botTs, userTs) | top 10 by latencyMs desc | project userTs, botTs, latencyMs, operation_Id, session_Id
content.title: Slowest Responses (24h)

content.query: let eventFailures = toscalar(customEvents | where timestamp > ago(7d) | extend result=tolower(tostring(customDimensions['Result'])) | where result in ('failed','error','timeout','cancelled') or name has_any ('Error','Exception','Failure') | summarize count()); let exceptionCount = toscalar(exceptions | where timestamp > ago(7d) | summarize count()); print eventFailures=coalesce(eventFailures,0), exceptionCount=coalesce(exceptionCount,0), totalErrorSignals=coalesce(eventFailures,0)+coalesce(exceptionCount,0)
content.title: Error Signals (7d)

content.query: customEvents | where timestamp > ago(7d) | where name in ('TopicStart','TopicEnd','GenerativeAnswers') | extend topic=coalesce(tostring(customDimensions['TopicName']), tostring(customDimensions['Topic'])) | extend result=tolower(tostring(customDimensions['Result'])) | summarize starts=countif(name=='TopicStart'), ends=countif(name=='TopicEnd'), genAnswers=countif(name=='GenerativeAnswers'), failures=countif(result in ('failed','error','timeout','cancelled')) by topic | order by starts desc
content.title: Topic Scorecard (7d)

content.query: customEvents | where timestamp > ago(2h) | extend channelId=tostring(customDimensions['channelId']) | where channelId in ('m365copilot','msteams','teams') | summarize incoming=countif(name=='BotMessageReceived'), outgoing=countif(name=='BotMessageSend'), genAnswers=countif(name=='GenerativeAnswers') by bin(timestamp, 5m), channelId | order by timestamp asc
content.title: Live Traffic (2h, 5m bins)
